summary: Senior Data Engineer with over 20 years of experience in designing ETL/ELT pipelines, cloud data platforms, and AI-driven solutions, adept at solving diverse coding problems and delivering high-quality code. Proficient in Python, C++, and Java, I excel in AI development, providing actionable feedback to enhance models and systems. My background as a Software Developer and Coder equips me to tackle complex challenges with clarity and precision. I am passionate about contributing to DataAnnotation’s mission of advancing AI technologies through innovative solutions. With a flexible approach to remote work, I am eager to design impactful coding solutions and support next-generation AI training. My expertise aligns with roles like Cloud Engineer and AI Trainer, ensuring impactful contributions to cutting-edge projects.

flagship_projects.name: AI-Powered Job Search Pipeline
flagship_projects.description: Built an end-to-end agentic job application pipeline using Python, Claude Code, and Grok (xAI). System orchestrates 10+ automated steps: semantic duplicate detection (FAISS vector embeddings), LLM-powered job scoring and tailoring, resume/cover letter generation, quality gating, and application tracking. Implemented multi-step agentic workflows with Claude Code and MCP server integration. Used RAG-style retrieval (FAISS + sentence-transformers) for semantic similarity matching across 100+ job postings.
highlights: Designed and built 10-step agentic orchestration pipeline (intake → score → tailor → generate → render → quality gate → track)
Implemented semantic duplicate detection using FAISS vector embeddings and sentence-transformers
Integrated Grok-3 LLM API for job scoring, resume tailoring, and cover letter generation
Built quality gate with automated pattern detection to prevent bad output from reaching submission
Used Claude Code and MCP servers for AI-accelerated development throughout

flagship_projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
flagship_projects.description: Replaced legacy manual forecasting processes with an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine built on Python, PySpark, and Streamlit. Reduced forecasting cycles by 90%. Built Prophet and scikit-learn models predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead. Created interactive Streamlit dashboard with real-time capacity insights and High Trust utilization scores.
highlights: Replaced manual forecasting — cut cycles by 90%
Prophet + scikit-learn models predicting bottlenecks 6 months ahead
Interactive Streamlit dashboard for real-time capacity insights

flagship_projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
flagship_projects.description: Designed full serverless data platform using S3 + Glue + Athena + Bedrock. Built Text-to-SQL GenAI agent using Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small file problem using Snappy + Parquet compression. Optimized ETL and data access for enterprise scale.

flagship_projects.name: FAST Project
flagship_projects.description: Data mining user performance metrics to optimize critical money-generating systems.
